# Vendored Dependency: Rosmaster_Lib

* **Version:** 3.3.9
* **Vendor:** Yahboom Technology
* **Source Docs:** https://www.yahboom.net/study/ROS-Driver-Board
* **Date Added:** 2026-03-07
* **License:** Proprietary (Manufacturer Driver)
* **Description:** Python driver for the Yahboom V3.0 Control Board (STM32F103RCT6).
* **Reason for Vendoring:** The library is not available on PyPI and the official GitHub repository contains large binaries/PDFs.
